title: The Past — Our Hope for the Future of Lititz
published_title: Join us for a conversation about BMX in Lititz, PA — The Past - Our Hope for the Future of Lititz
location: Remote or unspecified conversation about Lititz, Pennsylvania
summary: John Stancliff recalls the former BMX track in Lititz, how he discovered and raced there, local and regional BMX competition, and how a modern pump track could restore accessible wheeled recreation to the community.
historical_significance: Connects first-person local BMX memory with present-day advocacy and preserves testimony about the former Lititz track, nearby businesses, race culture, and community use.
transcript_status: Original machine transcript preserved unchanged; corrected machine transcript added separately; audio and speaker verification pending.
